docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY ROSALES, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT DASHIELL, LORI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LORI DASHIELL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-27-2014 AT 3:30 PM.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-16-2014 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSALES, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT DASHIELL, LORI
DASHIELL, LORI IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ROSALES, ROBERT
DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM. CHANGE DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSALES, ROBERT
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY ROSALES, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO JUN-16-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF HAS NAMED TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS A DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST LORI DASHIELL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SUED THE WRONG DEFENDANT--LORI DASHIELL, HE IS GOING TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO NAME THE CORRECT DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-21-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DASHIELL, LORI
